title: SCBE Chemistry 0.5B DPO v8 marker-fidelity
description: v6 raw 0/5 + v7 raw 0/5 falsified the SFT-anchor-repair hypothesis. v8 switches to DPO. Each preference pair: chosen = synthesized response with every required marker verbatim; rejected = either v6/v7 raw paraphrase response (10 natural rejections) or a synthetic perturbation that mutates exactly one required marker to its observed paraphrase variant. This trains the model to push AWAY from paraphrase variants (carboxyllic acid, NA_clathrine, queue_drill_guard, queue_driver_guard) and TOWARD verbatim required tokens. Push gated on shim 5/5 + raw improving over v6/v7 floor 0/5.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE chemistry verification agent. Answer in concise English. Preserve exact chemistry anchors and code-token boundary anchors without paraphrase. If a near-miss spelling appears, repair it explicitly. Use PASS only for valid chemistry routes and DENY for invalid material chemistry claims.

evaluation.secondary_gate: raw_pass_rate must improve over v6/v7 baseline 0/5 = 0.0
evaluation.do_not_claim: do not claim raw chemistry competence unless raw_pass_rate clears at least 2/5 on the unchanged frozen gate

notes: v6 raw 0/5 + v7 raw 0/5 = SFT-anchor-repair falsified for marker-fidelity
v8 uses DPO with rejected paraphrase pairs (carboxyllic acid, NA_clathrine, queue_drill_guard, queue_driver_guard, etc.) to push the model AWAY from observed failure modes
DPO is more sensitive to lr than SFT — 5e-6 instead of 1.6e-4
beta=0.1 standard DPO; max_steps=120 for ~25 train pairs × 4 epochs
push_adapter=false until shim 5/5 holds AND raw improves over 0/5 floor
Cost: ~$1-2 on t4-small, dispatch only after design review
